Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I know it probably looked dire last time, right? Sorry if I scared you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'd been reading a book before we met that day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I guess I got so absorbed in it that I didn't realize how cold the wind was.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 20 15 117}I see... That's something we have in common, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}I see... I suppose I didn't like them much either, back when I was healthier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 0 25 25}A terrible book is a terrible waste of time. And there's no more grievous sin than that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Nowadays, reading books is all I do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I find that they give me a way to escape everything else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I can just get lost in the book's private world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...Do you read books all the way through?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, you do...? I don't like to see them end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}Oh, do you...? I don't usually reach the end either, although I think our reasoning differs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}The more engaging a story is, the more I want to get lost in it, but... I'm always afraid to finish it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}...Because once I finish the story, I'll have to come back to reality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}This inescapable body of mine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Heartwarming stories, filled with hope...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Those are the kinds of books I like to read.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 1 25 25}They give me a little solace, when I have to come back to the real world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki smiled weakly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It looks like the sun is already setting... Time is so ruthless...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
